name: Marine
description: Shipboard soldiers of the Imperial Navy. Trained for boarding actions, ground assault, and zero-gravity combat.

support.name: Support
support.description: You provide logistics and support to the front-line marines.

star_marine.name: Star Marine
star_marine.description: You fight shipboard and in zero-g environments.

ground_assault.name: Ground Assault
ground_assault.description: You drop onto planets to seize objectives.

mishaps.1: Severely injured in action (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: A mission goes wrong and you are stranded behind enemy lines. Gain an Enemy and one level of any skill you choose.
mishaps.3: You witness atrocity — whether committed by your own unit or an enemy. Reduce INT or SOC by 1 and muster out.
mishaps.4: You are captured by the enemy and spend years as a prisoner. Gain a Contact (fellow prisoner) and an Enemy; you are unable to re-enlist this term.
mishaps.5: Your commanding officer is killed, disgraced or promoted past you, and you are forced out. Gain a Rival.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You are involved in a boarding action against a pirate or enemy vessel. Gain one of Vacc Suit 1, Gun Combat 1, Melee 1 or Tactics (military) 1.
events.4: You are deployed to a war-torn planet. Gain one of Recon 1, Survival 1, Stealth 1 or Gun Combat 1.
events.5: You are given a special assignment or commendation. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You perform well in a zero-g engagement. Gain Vacc Suit 1 or Athletics (dexterity) 1.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are given advanced training in a specialist field. Roll EDU 8+ to gain any one skill listed on the Service or Advanced Education tables at level 1.
events.9: Your unit leads a successful drop or boarding. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.10: You rescue a fellow Marine under fire. Gain them as an Ally and DM+1 to any one Benefit roll, or transfer to the Army without a Qualification roll.
events.11: You attend specialist training. Either gain one level of Battle Dress, Heavy Weapons, Explosives or Tactics (military), or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: Your actions in a critical operation bring you honour. You are automatically promoted and gain a medal.
